attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00043, derived from source AUC-043) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-EMG-01 bucket.

This is a bystander (parent)-reported case with an unconscious patient; almost all history came via a third party — disclosure_gate values set to standard schema enum values as no dedicated third-party gate exists in the schema.

Source note describes in-person IM naloxone 400mcg administration, high-flow oxygen, and 000 ICP dispatch already having occurred, with documented partial improvement; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telephone contact, before this intervention, per protocol reprojection rules.
Vitals and formal GCS/pupillary examination findings were clinician-observed and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.
over_triage_threshold set to T5 (the maximum tier) as a schema-compliant placeholder since no genuine over-triage scenario is clinically plausible for this presentation.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
